windows.embed_text_v2: Slow b-roll pan across styled candle-making flatlay: ivory soy jar candles, cinnamon sticks, twig ball, stainless measuring scoop, wick centering bars, corked match vial and amber fragrance oil bottle on wooden table; final frame shows presenter speaking to camera.
windows.summary_v2: Styled b-roll pan over a candle-making prop flatlay of finished jar candles and supplies, then cuts to a presenter speaking on camera under a branded neon sign.

tags_v2.action: displaying finished candles and supplies flatlay
tags_v2.setting: wooden tabletop styled flatlay then basement on-camera talking head
tags_v2.on_screen_text: UP Vibe (neon sign and hoodie logo in scene)

seconds_v2.desc: Wooden tabletop b-roll: several poured ivory soy candles in clear glass jars cluster on the left, with cinnamon sticks, a twig ball, a small metal measuring spoon, wick-centering bars and a corked vial of matches arranged on the right.
Slow camera drift across the same styled prop scene of finished jar candles, cinnamon sticks, metal scoop, wick centering bars and a corked match vial on the wooden surface.
Continuing pan over the candle-making styled flatlay: ivory candles in glass jars, cinnamon stick bundle, twig ornament, stainless measuring scoop, wick holders.
The frame slides further right showing more of the wick centering bars and the cork-stoppered matches vial alongside the cinnamon sticks and ivory jar candles.
View shifts: a small amber/orange glass bottle (fragrance oil) appears at right edge while the jar candles, cinnamon and wick bars remain center-left.
Pan continues right; the amber fragrance oil bottle is now more prominent, jar candles cluster on the left, cinnamon and metal wick bars in the middle.
Wider view of the styled candle scene with the fragrance oil bottle, a discarded silver jar lid, cinnamon sticks and wick centering hardware on the wood table.
Continued slow drift showing the amber fragrance oil bottle, scattered cinnamon sticks, a metal jar lid on the table and the edge of one ivory jar candle.
Cut to a man (face visible) in a black 'UP Vibe' branded hoodie speaking to camera in a basement with a glowing 'UP VibE' neon sign behind him; hands raised mid-gesture.
